defs: used in 閌閬|闶阆[kang1 lang2]
(literary) dry moat outside a city wall
see 閬中市|阆中市[Lang4 zhong1 Shi4]
Langzhong, a county-level city in Nanchong City 南充市[Nan2 chong1 Shi4], Sichuan
Langyuan paradise, home of the immortals in verse and legends
